title: Peteravenia phoenicolepis

As a member of the Asteraceae family, Peteravenia phoenicolepis is related to other plants like daisies and sunflowers. The exact classification of Peteravenia phoenicolepis is further categorized into a subfamily and tribe, but this information is not readily available. More research is needed to provide a more detailed classification.
